generic_rules: Place contracts in component type scopes for properties of the component itself, and in implementation scopes for implementation-level bindings.
Use the AADL model as the authoritative source for component structure and port definitions.
Focus on relating visible outputs to visible inputs when defining guarantees.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed within `annex agree { ... };` blocks.
Use concrete bounds, named constants, or visible relations when defining range assumptions and guarantees.
anti_patterns: Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes.
Avoid encoding AADL properties (e.g., Compute_Execution_Time) directly as AGREE expressions unless they are exposed as typed ports or constants.
